title: NG Fog-Remover
description: A best Fog remover Mod which use used to disabled the ugly regular fog in fabric with sodium no need of optifine. It is toggle by clicking N in the Keybind
body:
A best Fog remover mod develop by IMNIRAJ. It is used to remove ugly regular fog of minecraft. It is used in everydimension like World,the-nether,the-end. To toggle it on we need to click N button on keyboard the it will off the fog. It is a good mod which support fabric and sodium. if any one make video on it the consider mention me in comment or in yt mention me on this account.
www.youtube.com/@IM_NirajOfficial
